description_long: This is a modern commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft features two underwing turbofan engines, swept-back wings with noticeable winglets, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The fuselage is predominantly white with a bold, stylized red and blue Union Jack pattern on the tail and rear section, suggesting a British airline livery. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with a row of passenger windows running along each side. The landing gear is not visible in the images, but the overall design is consistent with a typical narrow-body jet airliner used for short to medium-haul flights.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet airliner with swept low wings, underwing engines, and a Union Jack tail design. Features a forward cockpit and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit windows, and both underwing engines with swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the fuselage, passenger windows, and the bold Union Jack pattern on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the symmetry of the swept-back wings with winglets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the engine, wing, and tail livery.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers at the base.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle, retractable (not visible but implied by design)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the nose of the fuselage.
